interface.shortDescription: Route brownfield work from idea or card to delta spec, implementation, proof, and closeout.
interface.longDescription: Deltaflow combines BMAD-style discovery, OpenSpec-style delta specs, Spec Kit-style consistency checks, and Superpowers/GSD-style verification discipline for brownfield agent workflows.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Deltaflow to turn this card or idea into the right level of discovery, delta spec, implementation, proof, and closeout.
